nasb.text: This will be written for the generation to come, That a people yet to be created may praise the Lord.

esv.text: Let this be recorded for a generation to come, so that a people yet to be created may praise the Lord:

cnv.text: 這些事要記下來，傳給後代， 好使將來出生的人民可以讚美耶和華。

ccb.text: 要为后代记下这一切， 好让将来的人赞美耶和华。

csbs.text: 愿这为后代记下， 好让受造的子民赞美耶和华：
